description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Ubuntu that runs on push and pull request events. Configure an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to build and deploy across multiple Docker images and compilers. For each matrix entry, install dependencies, perform a build, and deploy using Docker. On tag pushes, perform a release build and upload artifacts to GitHub Releases. On non-tag pushes, perform a daily build and upload artifacts to GitHub Releases with a prerelease flag.
